key_risks: A sharp reversal in crowded AI, semiconductor, or momentum trades could cause large underperformance versus the S&P 500.
Hot CPI/PPI data and higher Treasury yields could pressure high-valuation growth and technology exposures before the July exit.
South Korea and Taiwan country ETFs add currency and regional geopolitical risk, including China/Taiwan or North Korea-related shocks.
A broad risk-off move around the June employment report or July CPI release could hit high-beta equities more than SPY.
Semiconductor supply-chain earnings revisions or export-control headlines could specifically hurt the largest portfolio exposures.

portfolio.rationale: Strongest AI-linked momentum in the universe with very large 7-day, 30-day, 6-month, and 1-year relative strength; likely to benefit if risk appetite and AI capex narratives persist into July.
Exceptional recent and medium-term momentum with heavy semiconductor/export sensitivity, offering high beta to the same global electronics and AI cycle.
Semiconductor supply-chain exposure with strong 30-day and 6-month performance, complementing direct US semiconductor exposure.
Broad factor exposure to recent winners, which may continue to outperform during a one-month trend-following window.
Recent strong relative performance and a differentiated catalyst set tied to defense budgets and geopolitical risk, adding some diversification away from pure AI chips.

portfolio_rationale: The portfolio concentrates in the highest one-month relative-strength areas while diversifying across US semiconductors, Korea/Taiwan chip supply chains, broad momentum, and aerospace-defense. Over a one-month scoring window, trend persistence and high-beta leadership offer the best chance to beat the S&P 500 despite elevated volatility.
rationale_summary: Favor recent winners with clear near-term narratives: AI semiconductors, Asian tech supply chains, momentum factor exposure, and defense. The allocation is intentionally aggressive because the objective is maximizing one-month return relative to SPY, not minimizing drawdown.
